shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — The Wilkes-Barre/Scranton Penguins beat the Springfield Thunderbirds 2-0 in Game 1 of the Third Round to lead the Atlantic Division Finals Series 1-0. shorts.content_distilled: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY  — Child advocacy centers say limited state and federal funding is stretching resources thin, and a tour of one of their facilities provided insight into the struggles centers across the state face.
